REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION TO COMPEL DESTRUCTIVE TESTING IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ESTABLISH "GOOD CAUSE" THROUGH EVIDENCE THAT IT HAS TAKEN OTHER REASONABLE STEPS TO OBTAIN THE EVIDENCE SOUGHT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Destructive Testing
Off Calendar Nov-17-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PLAINTIFF HOLLY SMITH-HESSELGREN'S Motion To Compel Destructive Testing will be heard in Department 501, the real property/housing court, on the same date at the same time. All future motions in this case should be noticed to be heard in that department.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Kelley Anne DeYoung, CSR #6780. (302/HK)

Motion To Compel Destructive Testing
Off Calendar Nov-17-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Irene Fujii, 650-353-4503, for Plaintiff/Moving party Holly Smith-Hesselgten.
Jody Struck, 510-763-2324 for Defendant/Opposing party Carol Tweedle.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Motion To Compel Destructive Testing IS DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff fails to establish "good cause" through evidence that it has taken other reasonable steps to obtain the evidence sought. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Reported: Carol Haraburda, CSR#8052, 925-360-6065 (501)

See Reporter's Transcript for complete details

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Destructive Testing
Off Calendar Nov-04-2016 Continued To Nov-17-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Irene Y. Fujii of the law offices of Finkelstein Bender & Fujii LLP (650.353.4503) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Jody Struck of the law offices of Haapala Thompson & Abern LLP (510.763.2324) appears as counsel defendants/opposing parties

Defendants/opposing parties, Carol and Charles Tweedle do not stipulate to judge pro tem. Defendants are required to post court reporter fees and file notice. The cause is argued and submitted by both sides.

PLAINTIFF HOLLY SMITH-HESSELGREN'S Motion To Compel Destructive Testing is CONTINUED to November 17, 2016 at 9:30 AM in Department 302. Notice is waived.

Judge Pro Tem: Gregory A. Call; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)
